channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Same car parked illegally over night, 6th March
item.description:
One of the two usual cars reported previously parked illegally again over night at Pynfolds Estate. A resident of the estate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paradise Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 46 Belsize Road, NW6 4TG, 6th March
item.description:
Very large and growing pothole which is re-emerging following previous attempt to fix.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bins full and overflowing, 6th March
item.description:
Recycling bins full and overflowing
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filth, 6th March
item.description:
I reported this two weeks ago and you claimed it had been cleaned. No way has anyone done anything. Send a team to this entire area and clean it up properly please, the whole of elders end looks like Beirut. We are sick to death of it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 6th March
item.description:
Litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mabley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp outside number 18 not working, 6th March
item.description:
Street lamp outside number 18 Heath Side is not working, so no light.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathside, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Give Way sign damaged & leaning, 6th March
item.description:
The metal 'Give Way' sign has suffered an impact and is damaged & leaning over at an angle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Idmiston Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caravan dumped, 6th March
item.description:
Caravan has been dumped on Hammelton Road. No vehicle registration and is blocking more than 1 parking space. It is a eyesaw to the street and needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hammelton Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lazy shop keepers, 6th March
item.description:
The hoards of delivery riders that congregate ( illegally parked on the pavement ) at the fat Ox shop continue to throw cigarette butts and litter all over the street. Impose some fines please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on road near bend, 6th March
item.description:
Deep pothole on the bend. Side going towards the station on right side of that lane
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Marks Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area is kept in a terrible state, 6th March
item.description:
For some reason this area with the alley way behind the shops is a magnet for fly tipping, a disgusting amount of litter from overflowing bins, and lots of antisocial behaviour. The council need to do something permanent about this not just clean up the existing rubbish which will be back within a day.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on Zebra Crossing. One large on each side/direction, 6th March
item.description:
There are deepening potholes on the road on the raised zebra crossing in both directions of traffic and on one side a metre or so before the up ramp to it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chaseville Park Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light skipps green for pedestrians, 6th March
item.description:
Sometimes, the traffic light skipps green for pedestrians despite pressed button. Thank you!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadway, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped trampoline base, 6th March
item.description:
Flytipped trampoline base

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Half Moon Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags, 6th March
item.description:
2 black rubbish bags being plus other items being left in the communal area of the estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duddington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned mattress - blocking pavement - and house items., 6th March
item.description:
Mattress currently blocking pavement. Location is outside Penge Recreation, high street, penge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overfull bins that need cleaning, 6th March
item.description:
This street has bins which are overfilled with garbage, and needs cleaning asap by the Greenwich council.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple flytip by Barbrook house entrance, 6th March
item.description:
Multiple flytip by Barbrook house entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping, 6th March
item.description:
Rubbished dumped right by a play park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falconwood Parade, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Subsidence in road getting much worse., 6th March
item.description:
Pot hole has now developed on an area reported in sept last year 2025. The sinking of the toa D is now much worse. On direct school route and outside elderly housing complex.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardwick Court, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
